section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports a systolic ejection murmur of approximately 3 over 6.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Auscultatory murmur grading is an objective exam finding; while the patient can report being told they have a murmur, the specific 3/6 characterization is a clinician observation and fits better in the Objective section.

section_miscategorizations.text: Rescribe Jardiance 10 mg daily to initiate diabetes management.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The term 'Rescribe' is ambiguous; if this is intended as a continuation of an existing medication rather than a change or new order, it would belong in S. If it is a new or adjusted prescription, P is correct. Clarification of intent would remove the ambiguity.
